summary: Classified the 10 listed open PRs independently from the hydrated live PR inventory. No security-sensitive signal was present. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is safe or allowed for this shard; each PR remains open for proof/maintainer review rather than inventing a shared canonical.
